colors.primary_description: Navy/Slate - Used for main branding, navigation background, primary headings.
colors.secondary_description: Steel/Silver - Used for subheadings, borders, metallic/industrial accents.
colors.accent_description: Action Red - Used for CTAs, 'Valider' buttons, urgent notifications.

layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-sm (2px to 4px) to maintain a mechanical, sharp, industrial feel. Avoid heavily rounded corners.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Minimal drop shadows. Prefer 1px solid borders (border-slate-200) to separate cards. Use shadow-sm on hover.

buttons.primary: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white rounded-sm px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-sm px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-slate-300 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-sm px-6 py-3 transition-colors

cards.category_card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-sm p-6 flex flex-col items-center justify-center hover:border-slate-400 hover:shadow-md transition-all cursor-pointer group
cards.product_card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-sm p-4 flex flex-col

inputs.vin_search: w-full text-lg border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-sm px-4 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest focus:border-red-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-red-600 outline-none

badges.breadcrumb: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-slate-100 text-slate-800

landing.hero: High contrast hero. Large background image with a dark/navy overlay (bg-slate-900/70) to ensure readability. Center or left-aligned VIN search form.
landing.vin_search_block: White surface block floating over the hero. Contains heading 'Trouvez vos pièces auto', large input field for VIN, and a prominent 'Valider' (Red) button.
landing.trust_signals: Showcase car brands (VW, Audi, Mercedes) and delivery/payment promises below the hero.

vehicle_details.breadcrumb_header: A top bar showing parsed VIN data: [Model Name] / [Fuel Type] / [Electric/Thermique] / [VIN]. Styled as technical badges.
vehicle_details.category_selection: 3 main cards presented side-by-side: Mécanique, Électrique, Carrosserie. Each card should have a high-quality icon or realistic image representing the category.

parts_listing.grid: CSS Grid layout. Sidebar for filtering, main area for parts grid.
parts_listing.part_card: Image, Name, Reference Number, Price, and 'Ajouter au panier' CTA.

admin_dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation + main content area. High density data tables for Users and Orders. Striped rows, compact padding.

footer.layout: Dark navy background (bg-slate-900). Columns for 'À propos' (address, phone, email), 'Liens rapides', and 'Paiement'. Include Visa/Mastercard SVG logos.

logo.description: BENNOURI Pièces Auto Logo. Use in Header and Footer.

hero_background.description: Sleek dark modern car front. Use as the hero background with an overlay.

mechanic_working.description: Mechanic working on engine. Useful for 'About Us' or 'Services' sections.

brands_showcase.description: Audi and Mercedes side by side. Use to illustrate compatible premium car brands.

category_carrosserie.description: Disassembled car body parts for 'Carrosserie' category.

media.icons_strategy: Use Lucide React (lucide-react) for general UI icons (cart, user, search). For the 3 main categories, use highly detailed SVGs or the provided realistic images.

testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='vin-submit-button').
